ApiKeyCreateResponse.description: Returned only on key creation — includes the plaintext key (shown once).
ApiKeyCreateResponse.title: ApiKeyCreateResponse

ApiKeyResponse.description: Public metadata for an API key — never includes the plaintext key or hash.
ApiKeyResponse.title: ApiKeyResponse

ttl_seconds.description: Seconds until expiry. None = never expires.
ttl_seconds.title: Ttl Seconds

ttl_seconds.description: Seconds until expiry. 0 = clear TTL. None = no change.
ttl_seconds.title: Ttl Seconds

info.description: REST API for managing Hive memories, OAuth clients, and viewing activity stats.
info.title: Hive Management API

delete.description: Permanently delete all data for the authenticated user: memories, OAuth clients, and the user record itself. Requires `confirm: true` in the request body. The deletion is recorded in an immutable audit log. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Stream a JSON document containing the authenticated user's profile, all their memories, OAuth clients, and recent activity log entries (90-day window, matching the retention policy). Satisfies GDPR Article 20 and CCPA §1798.100 portability rights. Rate-limited to one export per 5 minutes per user.

Return eight pre-aggregated graph datasets for the authenticated user (activity heatmap, top-recalled memories, tag distribution, memory growth, quota, freshness, client contribution, tag co-occurrence) plus a ``client_names`` lookup map so chart labels can resolve client IDs without a second round-trip. Results are cached server-side for 60s per (user, window) pair.

schema.title: Response Get Account Stats Api Account Stats Get

get.description: Return recent activity events (memory creates, updates, deletes, client registrations, etc.) for the configured number of days.

parameters.description: Number of days of history to return
parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days of history to return
schema.title: Days

get.description:
Return CloudWatch alarm states for all Hive-prefixed alarms.

Admin-only. Results cached for 5 min.

schema.title: Response Get Alarms Api Admin Alarms Get

get.description: Immutable audit trail of every memory read/write/delete (#395). Admin-only. Use ``days`` to widen the window (capped at 90). Optional ``client_id`` / ``event_type`` filters narrow the result.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Log Api Admin Audit Log Get

get.description:
Return AWS Cost Explorer monthly spend breakdown.

Admin-only. Results cached for 24 h.

schema.title: Response Get Costs Api Admin Costs Get

get.description:
Return recent CloudWatch log events. Admin-only.

Args:
    group: Which log group(s) to query — mcp, api, or all.
    window: Lookback window — 15m, 1h, 3h, or 24h.
    filter_pattern: Optional CloudWatch filter pattern (passed verbatim).
    next_token: Pagination token from a previous response.

schema.title: Response Get Logs Api Admin Logs Get

get.description:
Return CloudWatch metric time-series for the current environment.

Admin-only. Period: 1h | 24h | 7d | 30d.

schema.title: Response Get Metrics Api Admin Metrics Get

get.description: Return a paginated list of OAuth clients. Non-admins see only their own clients.

post.description: Register a new OAuth 2.1 client via Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591). Returns the client credentials including the client secret.

delete.description: Permanently delete an OAuth client by its client ID. Non-admins can only delete their own clients.

get.description: Retrieve a single OAuth client by its client ID. Non-admins can only access their own clients.
Return metadata for all API keys belonging to the current user.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api Keys Get

post.description: Generate a new API key. The plaintext key is returned once and never stored.

delete.description: Permanently delete an API key by ID.
Delete all memories with the given tag. Non-admins can only delete their own memories.

schema.title: Response Delete Memories By Tag Api Memories Delete

get.description: Return a paginated list of memories. Supports optional tag filtering and semantic search. Non-admins see only their own memories.

post.description: Create a new memory or update an existing one with the same key. Returns 201 on create, 200 on update. Non-admins cannot overwrite another user's memory.

404.description: Memory not found (non-admin cannot overwrite another user's memory)

get.description: Stream all memories (or those with a given tag) as newline-delimited JSON. Sets Content-Disposition for browser download.

post.description: Import memories from a newline-delimited JSON body. Each line must be a JSON object with key, value, and tags fields. Upserts by key.

schema.title: Response Import Memories Api Memories Import Post

post.summary: Bulk import memories from JSON Lines

delete.description: Permanently delete a memory by ID. Non-admins can only delete their own memories.

get.description: Retrieve a single memory by its unique ID. Non-admins can only access their own memories.

patch.description: Partially update a memory's value and/or tags by ID. Non-admins can only update their own memories.

get.description: Stream raw binary or large-text content from S3 for image, blob, and text-large memories. Non-admins can only access their own memories.

post.description: Overwrite the current memory value with a previous version snapshot. Non-admins can only restore their own memories.
post.summary: Restore a memory to a previous version

get.description: Return all previous versions of a memory, newest first. Non-admins can only access their own memories.

schema.title: Response List Versions Api Memories  Memory Id  Versions Get

get.summary: List version history for a memory

get.description: Return summary counts for memories, clients, and activity events. Admins see platform-wide totals; non-admins see only their own data.
Return a paginated list of all registered users. Admin only.
Return the profile of the currently authenticated management user.

delete.description: Permanently delete a user account by ID. Admin only.

patch.description: Promote or demote a user's role. Admin only.

get.description: Return the quota overrides set for a user, plus effective limits. Admin only.

put.description: Override quota limits for a specific user. Pass null to revert to the system default. Admin only.

get.description: Return memory and client counts for a user. Admin only.
Handle the redirect from Google after user authentication.

400.description: Invalid or expired Google OAuth callback
